neighborhood: 襄阳北路 / 新乐路 (former French Concession)
address: Rooftop of Basement FG mansion, Xiangyang Bei Lu near Xinle Lu
restaurant_group: Bottega Group (also Bottega, Forno in Beijing/Shanghai)
signature_dishes: olive & anchovy skewers with pickled peppers
vibe_and_space: Rooftop bar-meets-restaurant. Gin & tonic menu, 8 sangria varieties, weekend DJs, occasional live flamenco. Energetic, photogenic, social.
one_paragraph_recommendation: Bottega Group's 2025 rooftop project — Spanish tapas with weekend programming (DJs, flamenco) that lands it firmly in 'casual fun group dinner' territory rather than serious food destination. Recommend for a friends evening or first-date pre-game where vibe and being-seen matter more than menu depth. The kitchen is competent but not the headline; the rooftop + sangria + crowd is. Not for a quiet date or business. Best in warm-weather months (May–Oct).
contradictions: Editorial 1st-impression coverage is strong but it's < 6 months old — food-quality reviews still calibrating. Treat 小红书 buzz cautiously.
